children.text: {{(get_low_stock.data || []).length > 0 ? `⚠ ${(get_low_stock.data || []).length} item(s) are below reorder level. Review below.` : ''}}

children.onClick: {{Number(inp_inventory_qty_modal.text || 0) <= 0 ? showAlert('Quantity must be greater than 0', 'error') : (appsmith.store.inventoryAction && appsmith.store.inventoryAction.mode === 'restock' ? restock_inventory.run({ itemId: appsmith.store.inventoryAction.row.itemId, quantity: Number(inp_inventory_qty_modal.text || 0), supplier: inp_inventory_extra_modal.text || appsmith.store.inventoryAction.row.supplier }).then(() => { get_inventory.run(); get_low_stock.run(); removeValue('inventoryAction'); showAlert('Restocked successfully', 'success'); }) : consume_inventory.run({ itemId: appsmith.store.inventoryAction.row.itemId, quantity: Number(inp_inventory_qty_modal.text || 0), reason: inp_inventory_extra_modal.text || 'Manual consumption' }).then(() => { get_inventory.run(); get_low_stock.run(); removeValue('inventoryAction'); showAlert('Consumed successfully', 'success'); }))}}

children.tableData: {{(() => { const a = appsmith.store.selectedAppointment || {}; const local = ((appsmith.store.localVisitServices || {})[String(a.appointmentId || '')]) || []; const backend = Array.isArray(get_visit_services_page.data) ? get_visit_services_page.data : []; const rows = local.length ? local : backend; return rows.map((s, i) => ({ serviceName: s.serviceName, description: s.description, unitCost: s.unitCost, quantity: s.quantity, subtotal: Number(s.unitCost || 0) * Number(s.quantity || 0), RemoveAction: 'Remove', serviceId: s.serviceId || i+1 })); })()}}
children.label: Data

children.text: {{(() => { const a = appsmith.store.selectedAppointment || {}; const rows = ((appsmith.store.localVisitServices || {})[String(a.appointmentId || '')]) || (Array.isArray(get_visit_services_page.data) ? get_visit_services_page.data : []); const total = rows.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (Number(s.unitCost || 0) * Number(s.quantity || 0)), 0); return 'Total: $' + total.toFixed(2); })()}}

children.tableData: {{(() => { const a = appsmith.store.selectedAppointment || {}; const local = ((appsmith.store.localVisitServices || {})[String(a.appointmentId || '')]) || []; const backend = Array.isArray(get_visit_services_page.data) ? get_visit_services_page.data : []; const rows = local.length ? local : backend; return rows.map((s, i) => ({ serviceName: s.serviceName, description: s.description, unitCost: s.unitCost, quantity: s.quantity, subtotal: Number(s.unitCost || 0) * Number(s.quantity || 0), RemoveAction: 'Remove', serviceId: s.serviceId || i+1 })); })()}}
children.label: Data

children.text: {{(() => { const a = appsmith.store.selectedAppointment || {}; const rows = ((appsmith.store.localVisitServices || {})[String(a.appointmentId || '')]) || (Array.isArray(get_visit_services_page.data) ? get_visit_services_page.data : []); const total = rows.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (Number(s.unitCost || 0) * Number(s.quantity || 0)), 0); return 'Total: $' + total.toFixed(2); })()}}

{{Array.isArray(get_inventory_options.data) ? ('Available IDs: ' + get_inventory_options.data.slice(0,6).map(i => `${i.itemId} ${i.itemName}`).join(', ')) : 'Enter an inventory item ID if this service consumes stock.'}}

{
  "patientId": {{Number((appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}).patientId || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.patientId || AppointmentTable.updatedRow["Patient ID"] || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.patientId || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow["Patient ID"] || 0)}},
  "dentistId": {{Number((appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}).dentistId || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.dentistId || AppointmentTable.updatedRow["Dentist ID"] || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.dentistId || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow["Dentist ID"] || 0)}},
  "appointmentDate": "{{(() => { const p = appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}; const r = AppointmentTable.updatedRow || {}; const t = AppointmentTable.triggeredRow || {}; const v = p.appointmentDate || r.appointmentDate || r.Date || t.appointmentDate || t.Date || moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD'); return moment(v).format('YYYY-MM-DD'); })()}}",
  "appointmentTime": "{{(() => { const p = appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}; const r = AppointmentTable.updatedRow || {}; const t = AppointmentTable.triggeredRow || {}; const raw = String(p.appointmentTime || r.appointmentTime || r.Time || t.appointmentTime || t.Time || '').trim(); if (!raw) return '09:00:00'; if (/^\d{1,2}:\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(raw)) return raw; if (/^\d{1,2}:\d{2}$/.test(raw)) return raw + ':00'; if (/^\d{1,2}$/.test(raw)) return raw.padStart(2,'0') + ':00:00'; return '09:00:00'; })()}}",
  "duration": {{Number((appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}).duration || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.duration || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.Duration || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.duration || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.Duration || 30)}},
  "status": "{{String((appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}).status || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.status || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.Status || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.status || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.Status || 'Scheduled')}}",
  "notes": "{{String((appsmith.store.pendingUpdateAppointmentPayload || {}).notes || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.notes || AppointmentTable.updatedRow.Notes || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.notes || AppointmentTable.triggeredRow.Notes || '')}}"
}
